Don't know why I see so many complaints. Is the game simple? Yes. Repetitive? Maybe after a few hours of play. The music annoying? Eventually, but only really after a long session and frankly, you don't have to listen to it. But as far as games I'd be able to play on a bus go (ie short, simple, not story/immersion obsessed) this one is rather enjoyable.
I think there's only 1 problem.... The music is really irritating at times but other than that its a nice game.
The game is randomized, so you get different obstacles every time, but it becomes repetitive after about an hour.
This is good but level forty whenever I tap on the door I jump as it is near the jump button pls fix bug
This one is not for the faint of heart, got to have patience. Not personally my kind of game, but a great game for those who enjoy this style.

The concept is awesome. Just a swipe sometimes that registers partially. I develop in unity too, so maybe you can put in a condition to check if the touch release was done a little further away. I was pressing on the boost button and accidentally moved my finger a little. A swipe was registered. Otherwise, awesome game.

Although most people on here complain because its unlike TLA, this game must be recognized for the fact that it is in fact a different game. And although simple, its fun, its a great way to kill time and after a long day of binging on all of the TLA series, I can happily say this game is a breath of fresh air compared to the other brain teasers. All though you still must remember to keep a watchful eye as you may get used to one obstacle, but find there is always a new one about to show!
